arts.ttl: Italy’s Finest Gear Up for Champions League Glory: Inter, Milan & Juventus Lead the Charge
arts.sum: The 2024/25 Champions League season is around the corner, with five Serie A teams looking to take the title back to Italy after 15 years. The last Italian club to conquer the most prestigious European tournament was Inter, doing so in their famous treble-winning 2009/10 campaign under Jose Mourinho. The post Italy’s Finest Gear Up for Champions League Glory: Inter, Milan & Juventus Lead the Charge appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Chelsea to offer €130m trio in exchange for Lautaro Martinez
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly planning an audacious swap deal bid to sign Inter Milan forward Lautaro Martinez . Martinez has been linked with numerous Premier League clubs over the past few years, but Enzo Maresca’s side are ready to step up their interest following their failure to land Victor Osimhen this summer.

Serie A: Monza vs Inter – probable line-ups
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi is expected to name a rotated selection of defenders and midfielders for Sunday...

After a draw and a win in Serie A against Inter, Monza have lost their last two matches in the competition against the Nerazzurri. Inter are unbeaten in Serie A at the U-Power Stadium against Monza (W1 D1); in the two matches between the two sides at this stadium, a total of 10 goals have been scored (an average of five per game) and neither team has kept a clean sheet.
